metadata.title: Weather Basics
metadata.source_description: Supplemental A1 vocab selected from coverage gaps

item.notes: Coverage gap: weather-basics. Essential season word used often in weather and daily life talk.
item.image_prompt: Polished digital illustration of autumn in Korea with colorful leaves along a city street and a crisp atmosphere, no text.

image.prompt: Polished digital illustration of autumn in Korea with colorful leaves along a city street and a crisp atmosphere, no text. Stylish, contemporary editorial illustration for an adult language learner in their 30s. Keep it warm, playful, and visually engaging without looking childish. Use clean composition, rich color, and a polished modern textbook feel. If the scene includes people, depict Korean people in a natural contemporary Korean setting. No text in the image.

cards.back_html:
autumn
가을
ga-eul

Examples

  • 가을은 선선해요.
    Autumn is pleasantly cool.
Coverage gap: weather-basics. Essential season word used often in weather and daily life talk.
Source: New vocab proposal • coverage-gap • weather-basics

examples.english: The air is dry in winter.

item.notes: Coverage gap: weather-basics. Useful beginner weather adjective, especially for winter and indoor comfort.

Use clean composition, rich color, and a polished modern textbook feel. If the scene includes people, depict Korean people in a natural contemporary Korean setting. No text in the image.

cards.back_html:
rain
비
bi

Examples

  • 비가 와요.
    It is raining.
Coverage gap: weather-basics. Essential beginner weather noun used in daily plans, forecasts, and small talk.

examples.english: The autumn breeze is pleasantly cool.

examples.english: There was a rain shower in the afternoon.
